events.name: Japan Trip 2026
events.context: Two-week trip with Dana to Osaka, Nara, Kyoto, Takayama, and Tokyo. All flights and hotels booked. In activity planning and shopping phase. Planning to buy 4 pairs of eyeglasses in Japan.
events.hook: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto and validate insurance/prescription requirements before the trip starts.

actions.name: Look up eyeglasses stores in Kyoto for early trip shopping
Validate insurance/prescription requirements for buying 4 pairs of glasses
